text:
Haruna (ハルナ, Haruna) Hunter × Hunter - Episode 77 (2011) is the single mother of Kurt and Reina who lives in a village in NGL. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 215 

Appearance

Haruna has long plum-colored hair that is usually in a ponytail. She wears a peach-colored dress with a green shirt over it.

Personality

Haruna deeply cared for her children and was thrown into a deep depression after their disappearance. The bond she had with her children allowed her to recognize Shidore as her daughter.

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Haruna appears in a flashback Colt has when he and his sister were humans. 

Roughly two months after the incident, Shidore—Reina's reincarnation—returns to the village while she is still mourning for her children. The mother immediately realizes she's Reina and still accepts her even as a Chimera Ant. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 30, Chapter 315 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

Haruna is only named in the 2011 anime adaptation. In the manga, her name is never given.
The 2011 anime adaptation expands the plot on Haruna showing her life with her children in a village located in NGL. She is deeply saddened by the deaths of her son and daughter and grows weak and thin as a result. During a Chimera Ant assault on their village, she protects a child from being taken by Colt and isn't taken back to the hive. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 78 (2011)
